author: eunjae-lee
subject: v6.10.0
body:
# [6.10.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.9.0...v6.10.0) (2021-02-23)

### Bug Fixes

* **infiniteHits:** do not cache the cached hits ([algolia/react-instantsearch#3011](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/3011)) ([aab9587](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/aab9587))

### Features

* **smartSort:** add widget ([algolia/react-instantsearch#3009](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/3009)) ([f06e5df](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f06e5df)), closes [#3010](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/3010)
